# Etude

> Etude is an AI-powered learning platform that turns any topic, notes, or PDF into flashcards, quizzes, and study guides, with progress tracking, streaks, and gamified learning for all ages.

## Pages
- [Home](/): Overview of Etude's AI study tools, features, pricing, and FAQ.

## Optional
- [Sign in](/auth): Create an account or log in to start learning.
